notes: Projection sheet width fix on desktop AND mobile. Switched .proj-table from table-layout: auto (where content forced first column to ~570px wide) to table-layout: fixed with explicit widths: first col 180px, value cols 120px on desktop; 36%/21%/21%/21% on mobile. Labels wrap naturally. Total desktop table width = 180 + 120×N months, scrolls horizontally inside .proj-table-wrap. Section-head italic subtitle hints (the gray '— start of month · click ▸ to expand adjustments' suffixes) now hidden universally — they were noise that bloated first-column width. Mobile updated from 44%/18.66% to 36%/21% (slightly less label space, more breathing room for numbers).
